name: @quoin/prim-searchable-list
description: Searchable list primitive — search input + filtered result list with combobox/listbox ARIA pattern. 3 variants (command-palette / autocomplete-results / filter-dropdown). Composes form-fields (input) + prim-label (optional result categories). Phase 22 Cons. 8.

optionalPeerPacks.@quoin/prim-label: ^1.0.0 (consumed for result-category badges in command-palette + autocomplete-results variants; not required for filter-dropdown if categories aren't displayed)

consolidates: anticipated command-palette-content (consumed by modal-dialog command variant)
anticipated list-with-search (consumed by nav search overlay + data-table column-filter)
